condition_mapping: Self-Forcing 不支持 audio-driven，本轮使用 text-only prompt 分别映射 half/full shot 的短时语义。

C_half_short.prompt_text: A waist-up portrait shot of a person speaking directly to the camera, natural facial expressions, subtle head motion, clean studio lighting.

C_full_short.prompt_text: A full-body shot of a person singing in front of the camera, expressive body movement, rhythmic performance, cinematic lighting.

skipped_conditions.C_half_long: 参考 test/self-forcing/test.md，当前稳定路径只验证到 21 帧短视频；长时推理尚未纳入本轮横评。
skipped_conditions.C_full_long: 参考 test/self-forcing/test.md，当前稳定路径只验证到 21 帧短视频；长时推理尚未纳入本轮横评。
